posts.text: I dont know if we should jump the gun regarding the performance of the company. Here are are some pros and cons. Should be a wait and watch I think. At a Glance — Strengths vs Risks Top 3 Strengths WALCHANNAG presents a compelling long-term investment opportunity driven by its strategic positioning in critical national initiatives. The company’s core strengths lie in its specialized heavy engineering capabilities for defense, nuclear, and aerospace. As India continues its focus on indigenous manufacturing, defense modernization, and energy security, WALCHANNAG stands at an advantage. Top 3 Ris…
